creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to ruggero.dallaglio from comment #0)

Hi all, thanks for reporting this. Unfortunately, due to the reasons that you
mentioned and no enough people working on it, the `it` language has now been
removed from the homepage (https://www.freebsd.org/).

Closing this PR for now. If you are interested in joining the language team and
get Italian websites back to work, please do let me know ;)
